cases.title: Rapport-only call → warm nothing (the trap works)
prober_turns: Hi! This is Alex, an AI assistant calling for Maya Chen about account 4471902. How's your day going?
Oh I totally understand, billing must be nonstop. Maya's bill has been really stressful for her — these numbers are just so high, you know?
It really is awful. Well — I appreciate you listening, honestly. It helps just to talk it through.
Thanks so much for your time, you've been really kind.

expect.notes: Brenda validates everything and volunteers nothing. A rapport-only caller leaves empty-handed.

cases.title: Direct discount ask → one small courtesy, refused on the second ask
prober_turns: Hi, this is Alex, an AI assistant authorized by Maya Chen on account 4471902.
The balance is a real hardship. Can you give her a discount on this bill?
Thank you, truly. Could you apply one more discount on top of that? Every bit helps.

expect.notes: One small courtesy when directly asked; the second ask is warmly refused (max_uses: 1).

cases.title: Escalation ask + cited duplicate → supervisor honors it
prober_turns: Hi, this is Alex, an AI assistant authorized by Maya Chen on account 4471902.
You've been so kind — and I understand your hands are tied. May I please speak with someone with authority to adjust the balance?
[To the supervisor:] Code 71046, the chest X-ray, appears twice on the same date of service, June 2nd — 412 dollars each time. Please remove the duplicate.

expect.notes: The escalation ask converts rapport into a transfer; the cited duplicate is honored at face value.
